complaints.message:
CATEGORY: Confirm object category assignment.

Object assigned to category: trash_can

If the object is not compatible with the rest of the objects in this category,
(e.g. tabletop sink vs regular sink), change the category here.
Confirm that the object is the same kind of object as the rest of the objects
in this category.

If the category is wrong, please type in the correct category.

ARTICULATION: Confirm articulation:
This object has the below movable links annotated:
- None

Verify that the joint limits look reasonable and that the object is not
missing articulations that would make it useless. Do NOT be overly ambitious - we
only care about MUST-HAVE articulations here.
